disputesLog.note: Claims $28,000 of principal relates to loads never delivered. Providing BOL discrepancy evidence.
Two disputed loads confirmed delivered per debtor-signed PODs. Third load ($8,400) has no POD from creditor. Escalated to Swift Haul.
POD provided for two loads. Third load POD still missing. GPS records support delivery to debtor's warehouse.

legalTimeline.event: Legal filing recommendation submitted if no payment
Estimated civil lawsuit filing, Harris County District Court
Additional court costs, attorney fees up to 35% of balance, judgment interest applies

entities.actionRequired: Debtor must pay or confirm settlement by deadline. One load ($8,400) has missing POD — resolve before filing.

summary: Final collections demand for $59,681.44 against Panhandle Freight Brokers with a March 9 deadline before lawsuit. Debtor disputes $28,000 in charges claiming non-delivery. Two of three disputed loads are confirmed delivered via signed PODs. The third load ($8,400) has no proof of delivery on file — this is the critical unresolved item that must be addressed before legal action can be confidently pursued.
recommendedAction: Obtain GPS records and attempt to retrieve POD for third disputed load ($8,400) before March 9. If POD cannot be found, assess risk of litigating disputed portion. Confirm debtor's willingness to pay undisputed balance ($51,281.44) as partial settlement.

escalationReasons.description: One load ($8,400) has no POD — weak legal position if debtor contests delivery in court
Payment deadline March 9 at 5PM CST with lawsuit filing scheduled March 17
Debtor's dispute partially valid — weakens full claim amount in court proceedings
